Hire a Fractional CMO

Expert Marketing Leadership,
On Your Terms.

Bring on a fractional CMO to own your GTM strategy, lead your team, and accelerate revenue. No long-term commitment. Immediate impact.

Start the Conversation See How It Works
The Engagement

Four-Step Onboarding Process

1

Discovery Call

30-min call to understand your team, revenue goals, and GTM gaps. We'll discuss scope, hours, and contract terms.

2

GTM Audit

We review your current positioning, messaging, pipeline, and team. Identify gaps and opportunities.

3

Strategy & Roadmap

Present a 90-day plan: team structure, campaigns, KPIs, and AI integration points.

4

Execution & Alignment

Launch campaigns, lead weekly syncs, track KPIs, and iterate. You see traction fast.

Weekly Commitment

What to Expect from Your Fractional CMO

Weekly Strategy Sync

1-hour call with your leadership team. Review KPIs, discuss pipeline health, plan the week ahead.

Campaign Direction

We own your quarterly campaigns—positioning, messaging, channel strategy, and optimization.

Team Coaching

Your marketing team gets direct guidance on execution, skill-building, and strategy ownership.

Flexible Engagement

Pricing Built for Growth Stage

Monthly Retainer Model

8–20 hours per week × $1,500–$3,000/hour = $12K–$60K/month depending on scope. Typical engagement is $15K–$35K/month.

Terms

  • ✓ 3–12 month engagements (no long-term lock)
  • ✓ Scale hours up or down based on your needs
  • ✓ Deliverables tied to KPIs—we prove value or adjust the engagement
Ready to Move Forward?

Let's Design Your GTM Strategy

Book a 30-minute call to discuss your goals, team, and how fractional CMO leadership can accelerate your revenue.
